query:
-- Check the current leaderboard data
SELECT 
  device_id,
  user_id,
  COUNT(*) as total_cycles,
  SUM(puzzles_count) as total_puzzles,
  MAX(created_at) as last_completed
FROM cycle_history
GROUP BY device_id, user_id
ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC
LIMIT 20;
